Venue_Constraints.Constraint: Only one class at a time

Hard_Constraints.Details: In a day max to max only 5P
Periods can be in combination of 3+2 with gap of 2 to 3 period in between
Avoid to have last period Maths and Science
Games and Hobby should not be on same day
Dance / Music / Hobby Period should not be on same day
Two same subject should not be consequtive
More then 2 period of same subject can not be on same day
Just after lunch games should not be given
At a time 2 Zumba period Should not be given
Zumba period should not be given in 8p and 10 p
II -VII classes should be alloted in between 3P to 10 Period
Hobby classes should be allotted as per mentioned days and timings only
Assembly and  Club Classes should be added as per the mentioned slot
